zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Briwere於1182年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾貝爾培時，她的父親William de Briwere II37歲，母親Beatrice de Vaux33歲。她與Ivo de Heriz II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1218年之後在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾恭納爾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Briwere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

variants.name: Bruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Briwere was born in 1182, in Belper, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Briwere II, was 37 and her mother, Beatrice de Vaux, was 33. She married Ivo de Heriz II. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1218, in Gonalston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Ivo de Heriz II. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1218, à Gonalston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Briwere(이)가 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 벨퍼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Briwere II(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Vaux(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Ivo de Heriz II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 곤알스턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Briwere родилась в 1182 г. в местности белпир, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Briwere II было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Vaux, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ivo de Heriz II. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1218 г. в местности гоналстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
